lines.speaker: Gunnjorn
lines.text: Haha welcome to my obstacle course. Have fun, but remember this isn't a child's playground. People have died here.

lines.speaker: Gunnjorn
lines.text: The best way to train, is to go round the course in a clockwise direction.

lines.speaker: Gunnjorn
lines.text: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the puzzle box with me.

lines.speaker: Gunnjorn
lines.text: That's not much use is it, go and fetch it!

lines.speaker: Gunnjorn
lines.text: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
